headline: Here Are The Biggest Losers From Oil Stock Rout
summary: Chevron weighed on the Dow Jones rally Friday afternoon as oil prices sank on Iran-related news. But Chevron stock, Exxon Mobil and other oil stocks pared losses after diving to multimonth lows. Oil Prices Sink The price of oil plunged on Friday as Iran's foreign minister declared the Strait of Hormuz would be "completely open" to commercial ships while the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon lasts.
